See the * [FAQ in the README](README.md#problems-with-invalid-numbers] on how to make * metadata changes. * * Do not modify this file directly! */ return [ 6753 => 'NCD', 67542 => 'Madang', 67545 => 'Sepik', 67547 => 'Morobe', 6755 => 'Highlands', 6756 => 'MP/Gulf/Tabubil/Kiunga', 6759 => 'Islands', ];
